description: CCP-12 synchronized hop vectors matching spec/02a:120 SelectChannel pseudocode using shared hash_32(FNV). Independent oracle per test integrity rules. Includes SFN wrap, multi-channel (8/16), rendezvous, density fallback. Covers ccp16-hop.json.

vectors.name: hop_sfn0_8ch
vectors.description: SFN=0 selects channel via hash_32 per spec 02a:120 SelectChannel pseudocode + hash_32. Independent oracle.

vectors.name: hop_sfn1_16ch
vectors.description: SFN increment with different seed via hash_32(EUI||SFN) % nch (FNV basis 0x811c9dc5, CCP-12). Cross-impl test vectors.

vectors.name: hop_sfn4294967295_8ch
vectors.description: SFN wraparound edge case via hash_32(EUI||SFN) % nch (FNV basis 0x811c9dc5, CCP-12). Cross-impl test vectors.

vectors.name: density_high_ch0
vectors.description: Density>8 returns 0 per SelectChannel pseudocode line 1.

vectors.name: sfn_wrap
vectors.description: SFN wraparound per spec Now() u32 mod and SelectChannel.

vectors.name: rendezvous_beacon_announce
vectors.description: Beacon/DIO rendezvous uses rx_channel preference (CCP-12 over pure hash for known peers).
